title: My Work - Exclude Option Vs Include Option
excerpt: It would be very helpful to be able to select boards you wish to exclude on the My Work Space and have all other boards added automatically, not just on the list, but actually checked.    This would make maintenance and …

posts.author: Carol_Hiscock (Carol Hiscock)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very helpful to be able to select boards you wish to exclude on the My Work Space and have all other boards added automatically, not just on the list, but actually checked. This would make maintenance and usability much more useful for us.
